agents.name: meok-aaif-agent-card-mcp
agents.card_description: Audits AI systems and compliance posture against the EU AI Act, DORA, NIS2, CRA, CSRD, GDPR, HIPAA, SOC 2, ISO 42001 and NIST AI RMF via 15 Python MCP servers. Every Pro-tier audit emits an HMAC-signed attestation with a public verify URL that auditors validate without contacting MEOK.

skills.name: EU AI Act compliance audit
skills.description: Risk classification (Annex III), 42-point audit, penalty calculator against Regulation (EU) 2024/1689. Signed attestation on Pro tier.

skills.name: DORA ICT-risk audit
skills.description: Regulation (EU) 2022/2554 ICT risk + third-party register checks, signed certificate via get_dora_certificate.

skills.name: NIS2 governance audit
skills.description: Directive (EU) 2022/2555 entity classification + 10 governance domains.

skills.name: Deepfake & content-authenticity marking (Article 50)
skills.description: Two-layer machine-readable marking: invisible watermark + C2PA 2.1 credentials + Sigstore; Article 50 attestations ahead of the 2 Aug 2026 enforcement.

skills.name: Agent security — Guardian for Hives
skills.description: Prompt-injection firewall, hash-chained audit logging (Art 12), policy enforcement, certified A2A handoffs, data-residency checks, MCP injection scanning.

skills.name: DPIA / FRIA / IFU / TLPT generators
skills.description: EDPB-template DPIAs, Article 27 FRIAs, Article 13 Instructions-for-Use, DORA Article 26 TLPT plans, CRA Annex-IV classification — board-ready, signed on Pro.

skills.name: HMAC-signed attestation issuance + public verification
skills.description: Issues tamper-evident HMAC-SHA256 attestations with cert_id + public verify URL at meok-attestation-api.vercel.app/verify/<cert_id>. Independent verifier: pip install meok-attestation-verify.
